note: NAIC AI Model Bulletin (Aug 2020, rev. 2023) + AIS Evaluation Tool (2024 ed.) readiness diagnostic. 6 dimensions scored 0-3; total 0-18. Tier thresholds: GREEN >= 78% (14/18), YELLOW >= 44% (8/18), RED below 44%. 24+ states adopted as of mid-2026; 12-state exam pilot Jan-Sep 2026.

vectors.name: all_implemented_green_exam_ready
vectors.description: All 6 dimensions at score 3 (IMPLEMENTED). Total 18/18 = 100%. Known: readiness_tier=GREEN, readiness_label=EXAM_READY.

do_now: All dimensions at Partially Implemented or above — focus on documentation and exam-evidence preparation.
output_payload.adopted_states_note: NAIC AI Model Bulletin adopted or substantially adopted by 24+ states as of mid-2026. 12-state market-conduct exam pilot ran Jan-Sep 2026 (verify current adoption status with NAIC and state regulator before relying on this count).
output_payload.exam_pilot_note: 12-state market-conduct exam pilot ran Jan-Sep 2026 per NAIC. Verify current exam schedule with your state regulator.
output_payload.regulatory_basis: NAIC AI Model Bulletin (Aug 2020, rev. 2023); NAIC AI Systems (AIS) Evaluation Tool (2024 edition); NAIC Market Regulation Handbook (2024)
output_payload.table_source: NAIC AI Model Bulletin (adopted Aug 2020, updated 2023); NAIC AI Systems Evaluation Tool (2024 ed., naic.org)

vectors.name: mixed_scores_yellow_in_progress
vectors.description: Mixed scores (2/2/1/2/1/1 = 9/18 = 50%). Known: YELLOW tier, IN_PROGRESS label; 3 planning-level gaps in data governance, transparency, audit.
